name: The Void
short_description: Join the quest to overtake the void and become a hero! In this game, you will slay your enemies in a point and click fashion and overtake the void for good, or so you think... Join the quest in taking over the void to find out!
detailed_description:
New major overhaul coming soon! Stay tuned!

Relax, take a break, and join the quest to take over the void!

Story:

During the dark downfall of the world in the year 2908, you must scavenge the wastes of the void, a place where no man walks. In this place you find an entire society of toxic and foul creatures all praising a king. You decide to enter the territory and have to face the wrath of the king and the toxic townsmen. defeat the king and exit the void to warn others of what's to come...

Gameplay:

In this game, you will play as a soldier blasting his way through enemy waves as more and more enemies arrive. The controls are simple, you use WASD to run around the playable area. In order to destroy the enemies of the void, you must point and shoot them to defend your being. Eventually, you will find yourself taking on the king and taking over the void.

Extra:

If you want a challenge, try speed running the game to different levels. maybe you could the best scavenger the land has ever seen!

Update!

The Void 2.0 is coming soon
